description_long: This object is a toy revolver-style handgun with a metallic silver and black finish, featuring a prominent black grip adorned with colorful circular stickers. The barrel is relatively short and robust, with a visible ejector rod beneath it. Attached to the muzzle is a detachable purple suction-cup dart, indicating its non-lethal, playful nature. The cylinder and hammer are clearly defined, and the trigger guard is rounded and substantial. The grip appears ergonomically contoured, and the overall design mimics a classic revolver, but the bright suction cup and stickers add a whimsical, child-friendly touch.
description: A toy revolver with a metallic body, black grip with stickers, and a purple suction-cup dart attached to the barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the revolver, the black grip with stickers, and the purple suction-cup dart aligned below the barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle opening and the circular face of the purple suction-cup dart, with the grip and barrel aligned vertically.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other side of the grip with stickers, the cylinder, and the purple suction-cup dart below the barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the full face of the purple suction-cup dart, with the barrel extending away.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is robust and contoured for ergonomic handling, predominantly black with a smooth, slightly glossy finish. It features colorful circular stickers as embellishments, adding a playful and decorative element. The grip appears to have gentle finger grooves for comfort, and its shape is rounded with a slight palm swell for better control. No checkering or stippling is visible, and the surface is mostly smooth except for the sticker decorations.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing ample space for finger placement. It has a smooth, continuous curve with no undercuts or squared-off edges, and lacks any visible texturing or reinforcement. The design is simple and functional, with no integrated accessories or distinctive features beyond its solid, protective form.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and cylindrical with a smooth, metallic finish, resembling a standard revolver profile. It is not threaded or ported, and there are no compensators or external attachments except for the detachable purple suction-cup dart. The exterior is unmarked and maintains a consistent diameter along its length.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible engravings, inscriptions, or manufacturer markings on the slide or barrel. The only decorative elements are the colorful stickers on the grip, with no text or logos present on the metallic surfaces.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The revolver does not have a traditional magazine base or floorplate, as it is modeled after a classic revolver design. The grip base is rounded and smooth, with no extensions, bevels, or finger rests, and is visually distinguished only by the presence of a circular sticker.
